# feat(m3): convert all 8 exercises to R10 directory structure

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `7b665f88740d` — feat(m3): convert all 8 exercises to R10 directory structure

**Body**:

Per-technique files with 5-phase narrative (Theory → Build → Train → Visualise → Apply).

Exercises:
  ex_1: 5 files (feature eng, filter/wrapper/embedded selection, validation)
  ex_2: 5 files (bias-variance, Ridge, Lasso/ElasticNet, CV, learning curves)
  ex_3: 6 files (SVM, KNN, NB, DT, RF, zoo comparison)
  ex_4: 4 files (boosting theory, XGBoost, LightGBM/CatBoost, tuning)
  ex_5: 5 files (metrics, sampling, loss functions, thresholds, calibration)
  ex_6: 5 files (SHAP global, permutation, LIME, interactions, fairness)
  ex_7: 5 files (workflow, DataFlow, HP search, model registry, orchestration)
  ex_8: 5 files (conformal, drift, model card, deployment, readiness)

Total: 40 technique files × 3 formats + 8 shared modules.
Helpers in shared/mlfp03/ex_N.py.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
